renames.rationale: Tiny 7-instr leaf wrapping CloseHandle; classic thunk/forwarder shape with no other callees.
Called from common_sopen_dispatch<>; uses CreateFileW + __acrt_lowio_set_os_handle + _alloc_osfhnd + configure_text_mode + truncate_ctrl_z_if_present. CRT lowio open implementation.
Shared helper of fp exception handlers; calls _ctrlfp and _set_errno_from_matherr. Used by both float and double exception raisers.
Calls _exception_enabled, _raise_exc (double variant), _set_errno_from_matherr, _ctrlfp; mirror of float variant at 140055514. CRT _fdtest/_except1-style double FPE raiser.
Same shape as 1400553ec but calls _raise_excf (float). CRT float FPE raiser.
Tiny wrapper around __acrt_initialize_multibyte; CRT mbcs init forwarder.
Called from __acrt_fltout; 1386-byte float-to-string conversion core that drives log10-based digit formatter at 140056a90.
Strings 'log10' x2 indicate libm log10 call site; called by fltout core and forwards to fp helper. Computes exponent via log10.
Bridges log10 call site to raise_fp_exception_double; handles domain/range errors for log10.
Sole caller is common_set_variable_in_environment_nolock<char>; helper for environment variable mutation.
Sole caller fp_format_a; assistive routine for %a hex-float formatting.
